subject: Armand Azoulay to Jeffrey Epstein
body:
Dear Jeffrey,


I decided to write this e-mail because we never had the opportunity to talk together.
Basically, I think that we have a gold mine in our hands ( talking about my 3D technology), soon 3D will be used everywhere ( TV sets, monitors, mobile phones, digital signage, movies) .There is not many competitors on this new market and I think Artistic Images is one of the most serious actors. 
 
As you know, I funded myself all the researches of Artistic Images, everything was going well, until the unpaid bill from Carrefour when the President and all his team changed which changed our relation with Carrefour.


During our last meeting, I tried to explain to you the faster and more secure way for you to help us, but my English is so poor, that  you probably did not understand what I wanted to explain.
 
So, today we need 5 millions euros to continue our research program.


To be secure, the best solution in France for you is to pay the other creditors on the buildings and so you will be on first rank, and in case of problem the buildings will be sold to pay you. If you want to grant only 5 millions, it is secure too but it is more complicated, because you have to share the building's guarantee with three other people.


To summarize: if you are ready to help us, I give you for free 50% shares of Artistic Images with all the patents, 5 millions euros for our needs + 13 millions euros for loans+ expenses.
We can fix a deadline for make you money back, if we don't succeed, you can own the buildings and sell it. In this area, the real estate is growing up every day. This way, your loan is 100% guaranteed .


This operation can be made quickly with a notary.


It is possible to meet together when you want.


I remain at your disposal should you need any further information.




All the best
 
Armand 
06 22 52 07 01





Ne gardez plus qu'une seule adresse mail ! Copiez vos mails vers Yahoo! Mail


      _____________________________________________________________________________ 
Ne gardez plus qu'une seule adresse mail ! Copiez vos mails vers Yahoo! Mail http://mail.yahoo.fr
body_html:
Dear Jeffrey,


I decided to write this e-mail because we never had the opportunity to talk together.

Basically, I think that we have a gold mine in our hands ( talking about my 3D technology), soon 3D will be used everywhere ( TV sets, monitors, mobile phones, digital signage, movies) .There is not many competitors on this new market and I think Artistic Images is one of the most serious actors.

 

As you know, I funded myself all the researches of Artistic Images, everything was going well, until the unpaid bill from Carrefour when the President and all his team changed which changed our relation with Carrefour.


During our last meeting, I tried to explain to you the faster and more secure way for you to help us, but my English is so poor, that  you probably did not understand what I wanted to explain.

 

So, today we need 5 millions euros to continue our research program.


To be secure, the best solution in France for you is to pay the other creditors on the buildings and so you will be on first rank, and in case of problem the buildings will be sold to pay you. If you want to grant only 5 millions, it is secure too but it is more complicated, because you have to share the building's guarantee with three other people.


To summarize: if you are ready to help us, I give you for free 50% shares of Artistic Images with all the patents, 5 millions euros for our needs + 13 millions euros for loans+ expenses.

We can fix a deadline for make you money back, if we don't succeed, you can own the buildings and sell it. In this area, the real estate is growing up every day. This way, your loan is 100% guaranteed .


This operation can be made quickly with a notary.


It is possible to meet together when you want.


I remain at your disposal should you need any further information.



All the best

 

Armand

06 22 52 07 01
